title: psilantha arundinacea
intro: Psilantha arundinacea, also known as Euphrasia arundinacea or Eyebright, is a flowering plant that belongs to the mint family (Orobanchaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating eye infections and inflammation, due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Psilantha arundinacea include its ability to soothe sore eyes, reduce swelling, and alleviate symptoms of conjunctivitis and other eye conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant often come in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
